_comment: Atlas Vector Search index definition for Ask Orbit RAG. Paste this JSON into the Atlas UI at:  Database → your cluster → Search → Create Search Index → JSON Editor.  Database: <your db> · Collection: kb_chunks · Index Name: kb_chunks_vector_index.  Dimension 1024 matches Voyage voyage-3. If you switch to voyage-3-lite (512-dim), change 'numDimensions' below and re-index everything.

_usage_notes.similarity: cosine — Voyage models are L2-normalized so cosine and dot-product are equivalent; cosine is the safer default.
filters: reference_id — cite a specific article, or exclude one from retrieval
section_number — narrow retrieval to e.g. only 'Failure Patterns' (§8) chunks
embedding_model — safety net during model migrations so you can filter to the current model only
